title: selaginella pseudovolkensii
intro: Selaginella pseudovolkensii, also known as the pseudo-volkens' spikemoss, is a species of spikemoss, a type of small, non-vascular plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Selaginella pseudovolkensii include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory function, as well as its potential to act as an antioxidant and protect against cell damage. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant is often used in tea or tincture form, although further research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and effects.
